infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: BailMate needs your location to match you with nearby providers and monitor municipality geofence alerts.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: BailMate needs background location access to monitor municipality geofence alerts even when the app is not open.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: BailMate needs background location access to monitor municipality geofence alerts.
